entries.name: Playwright MCP
entries.description: Browser-automation MCP server that lets agents drive Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit through Playwright—navigate, click, fill forms, and capture accessibility snapshots.
entries.author: microsoft
entries.description_zh: 基于 Playwright 的浏览器自动化 MCP 服务,让智能体驱动 Chromium、Firefox 与 WebKit——导航、点击、填表、抓取可访问性快照。
entries.description_en: Browser-automation MCP server that lets agents drive Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit through Playwright—navigate, click, fill forms, and capture accessibility snapshots.
entries.long_zh: 微软官方的 Playwright MCP 服务向 MCP 客户端开放结构化的浏览器控制,基于可访问性树而非截图,让智能体在确定性的页面结构上操作。
entries.long_en: Microsoft's official Playwright MCP server exposes structured browser control to MCP clients, using accessibility trees rather than screenshots so agents act on deterministic page structure.
entries.sec_note_zh: 可控制浏览器并访问任意 URL;请对可信目标使用,启用前先审阅。
entries.sec_note_en: Controls a browser and can reach any URL; run against trusted targets and review before enabling.

entries.name: Desktop Commander
entries.description: Gives Claude terminal control with filesystem search and edit across your machine—run commands, manage processes, and read or modify files.
entries.author: wonderwhy-er
entries.description_zh: 赋予 Claude 终端控制能力,并可在本机搜索与编辑文件系统——执行命令、管理进程、读写文件。
entries.description_en: Gives Claude terminal control with filesystem search and edit across your machine—run commands, manage processes, and read or modify files.
entries.long_zh: Desktop Commander 是把模型连接到真实 shell 与本地文件系统的 MCP 服务,可在对话中执行长任务命令、编辑代码并管理进程。
entries.long_en: Desktop Commander is an MCP server that bridges the model to a real shell and the local filesystem, enabling long-running commands, code edits, and process management from a conversation.
entries.sec_note_zh: 授予完整的终端与文件系统访问权限——能力很高;请审阅权限范围,仅在可信机器上运行。
entries.sec_note_en: Grants full terminal and filesystem access—high capability; review scope and run only on machines you trust.

entries.name: Mobile MCP
entries.description: Mobile-automation MCP server for iOS and Android—drives simulators, emulators, and physical devices for UI testing and scraping.
entries.author: mobile-next
entries.description_zh: 面向 iOS 与 Android 的移动自动化 MCP 服务——驱动模拟器、仿真器与真机,用于 UI 测试与抓取。
entries.description_en: Mobile-automation MCP server for iOS and Android—drives simulators, emulators, and physical devices for UI testing and scraping.
entries.long_zh: Mobile MCP 通过类 Appium 的自动化把移动设备控制开放给智能体,覆盖 iOS 与 Android,让模型可点击、输入并检视应用界面。
entries.long_en: Mobile MCP exposes mobile device control to agents via Appium-style automation, working across iOS and Android targets so a model can tap, type, and inspect app screens.
entries.sec_note_zh: 可驱动真机与应用;启用前请审阅其可访问的目标范围。
entries.sec_note_en: Drives real devices and apps; review which targets it can reach before enabling.

entries.name: Frontend Slides
entries.description: Create beautiful web-based slide decks with a coding agent, using real frontend skills instead of a slide template.
entries.author: zarazhangrui
entries.description_zh: 用编码智能体创建精美的网页幻灯片,基于真实的前端技巧而非套用幻灯片模板。
entries.description_en: Create beautiful web-based slide decks with a coding agent, using real frontend skills instead of a slide template.
entries.long_zh: 把编码智能体变成幻灯片设计师的技能,生成可在浏览器中打开与分享的精致 HTML/CSS 演示。
entries.long_en: A skill that turns a coding agent into a slide designer, generating polished HTML/CSS presentations you can open and share in a browser.
entries.sec_note_zh: 生成本地网页文件;分享前请审阅产物。
entries.sec_note_en: Generates local web files; review output before sharing.

entries.name: Guizang Social Card
entries.description: Generate Xiaohongshu carousels and WeChat-style social cards from your content with consistent visual styling.
entries.author: op7418
entries.description_zh: 从你的内容生成小红书图文与微信风格的社交卡片,保持统一的视觉风格。
entries.description_en: Generate Xiaohongshu carousels and WeChat-style social cards from your content with consistent visual styling.
entries.long_zh: 排版社交媒体卡片(小红书图文、微信卡片)的设计技能,让编码智能体产出可直接分享的视觉物料。
entries.long_en: A design skill that lays out social-media cards (Xiaohongshu carousels, WeChat cards) so a coding agent can produce share-ready visuals.
entries.sec_note_zh: 产出本地图片/HTML 物料;发布前请审阅。
entries.sec_note_en: Produces local image/HTML assets; review before publishing.

entries.name: Obsidian Second Brain
entries.description: Turn your Obsidian vault into an AI-first second brain that works across command-line agents.
entries.author: eugeniughelbur
entries.description_zh: 把你的 Obsidian 仓库变成以 AI 为先的第二大脑,可在多种命令行智能体间通用。
entries.description_en: Turn your Obsidian vault into an AI-first second brain that works across command-line agents.
entries.long_zh: 一个跨 CLI 的技能,帮助智能体阅读、整理并持续扩充 Obsidian 仓库,作为活的知识库。
entries.long_en: A cross-CLI skill that helps an agent read, organize, and grow an Obsidian vault as a living knowledge base.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会读写你的笔记仓库;请仅指向你掌控的仓库。
entries.sec_note_en: Reads and writes your notes vault; point it only at vaults you control.

entries.name: Archify
entries.description: Generate clean architecture diagrams with light and dark themes from any agent.
entries.author: tt-a1i
entries.description_zh: 在任意智能体中生成简洁的架构图,支持浅色与深色主题。
entries.description_en: Generate clean architecture diagrams with light and dark themes from any agent.
entries.long_zh: 生成架构与系统图的技能,可直接在对话中帮你记录代码库结构。
entries.long_en: A skill that produces architecture and system diagrams, helping document a codebase's structure directly from a conversation.
entries.sec_note_zh: 生成本地图表文件;无需提权访问。
entries.sec_note_en: Generates local diagram files; no elevated access required.

entries.name: Pixel2Motion
entries.description: Turn raster logos into smooth animated SVGs.
entries.author: nolangz
entries.description_zh: 把位图 logo 转换为流畅的动画 SVG。
entries.description_en: Turn raster logos into smooth animated SVGs.
entries.long_zh: 把 logo 矢量化并加上动画的技能,从静态图片产出轻量的 SVG 动效。
entries.long_en: A skill that vectorizes and animates logos, producing lightweight SVG motion from a static image.
entries.sec_note_zh: 处理本地图片;无需提权访问。
entries.sec_note_en: Processes local images; no elevated access.

entries.name: Hue
entries.description: Learn any brand and turn it into a complete, reusable design system.
entries.author: dominikmartn
entries.description_zh: 学习任意品牌,并将其转化为完整、可复用的设计系统。
entries.description_en: Learn any brand and turn it into a complete, reusable design system.
entries.long_zh: 提取品牌视觉语言(色彩、字体、间距)并输出连贯设计系统的技能,供智能体一致地应用。
entries.long_en: A skill that extracts a brand's visual language (color, type, spacing) and outputs a coherent design system an agent can apply consistently.
entries.sec_note_zh: 读取你提供的品牌素材;请审阅抓取的来源。
entries.sec_note_en: Reads brand assets you provide; review fetched sources.

entries.name: Agentic SEO
entries.description: An LLM-first SEO analysis skill with keyword research and on-page audit modules.
entries.author: Bhanunamikaze
entries.description_zh: 以 LLM 为先的 SEO 分析技能,包含关键词研究与页面内审计模块。
entries.description_en: An LLM-first SEO analysis skill with keyword research and on-page audit modules.
entries.long_zh: 执行结构化 SEO 分析(关键词、页面内检查与建议)的技能,可在多种智能体 CLI 中使用。
entries.long_en: A skill that runs structured SEO analysis—keywords, on-page checks, and recommendations—usable across multiple agent CLIs.
entries.sec_note_zh: 分析你提供的页面;请审阅它抓取的任何 URL。
entries.sec_note_en: Analyzes pages you provide; review any URLs it fetches.

entries.name: Vibe Check
entries.description: A product-management skill that guides a beginner from a raw idea to a validated, buildable plan.
entries.author: TexasBedouin
entries.description_zh: 一个产品管理技能,带新手从原始想法走到经过验证、可落地的方案。
entries.description_en: A product-management skill that guides a beginner from a raw idea to a validated, buildable plan.
entries.long_zh: 由资深 0→1 产品经理打造,这个技能把发现、范围界定与验证流程结构化,让非产品人也能稳妥地规划产品。
entries.long_en: Built by a long-time 0-to-1 product manager, this skill structures discovery, scoping, and validation so non-PMs can plan a product responsibly.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯文本指导;不访问系统。

entries.name: Prompt Architect
entries.description: Transform vague requests into structured, expert-level prompts.
entries.author: ckelsoe
entries.description_zh: 把模糊的需求转化为结构化、专家级的提示词。
entries.description_en: Transform vague requests into structured, expert-level prompts.
entries.long_zh: 一个围绕意图发问、把松散需求改写为精准且范围明确提示词的技能,适用于任意模型。
entries.long_en: A skill that interviews you about intent and rewrites loose asks into precise, well-scoped prompts for any model.

entries.name: Project Butler
entries.description: A project-memory system for AI coding assistants that preserves context across sessions.
entries.author: JamesShi96
entries.description_zh: 面向 AI 编码助手的项目记忆系统,在多次会话间保留上下文。
entries.description_en: A project-memory system for AI coding assistants that preserves context across sessions.
entries.long_zh: 维护持久项目上下文(决策、结构、笔记)的技能,让 Claude Code、Cursor 等助手能延续上下文继续工作。
entries.long_en: A skill that maintains durable project context (decisions, structure, notes) so assistants like Claude Code or Cursor resume with continuity.
entries.sec_note_zh: 在本地存储项目笔记;请审阅其持久化的内容。
entries.sec_note_en: Stores project notes locally; review what it persists.
